heading: Army and Navy registers
label: 1304 Army and Navy registers
text: In addition to the usual number of the registers of the Army and Navy, fifteen hundred copies of each shall be printed: five hundred for the Senate, and one thousand for the House of Representatives.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 245 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 245 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
